foxai.py.content:
from ui.splash import show_splash
from ui.main_window import FoxAIApp

if __name__ == "__main__":
    show_splash()
    app = FoxAIApp()
    app.mainloop()

Create Desktop Shortcut.ps1.content:
$WScriptShell = New-Object -ComObject WScript.Shell
$Desktop = [Environment]::GetFolderPath("Desktop")
$Shortcut = $WScriptShell.CreateShortcut("$Desktop\FoxAI.lnk")
$Shortcut.TargetPath = "$PSScriptRoot\Start FoxAI.bat"
$Shortcut.WorkingDirectory = "$PSScriptRoot"
$Icon = "$PSScriptRoot\assets\foxai.ico"
if (Test-Path $Icon) { $Shortcut.IconLocation = $Icon }
$Shortcut.Save()
Write-Host "Created FoxAI desktop shortcut."

comfyui_coupling_lines: echo ComfyUI folder not found at %~dp0ComfyUI

architecture.desktop_runtime_strategy: Create a dedicated USB-owned full Windows Python runtime under Runtime/Desktop/python. The current embedded core Python cannot be the Desktop interpreter because it lacks tkinter/Tcl/Tk.
architecture.core_reuse_strategy: Reuse Runtime/Core/site-packages for shared packages. Do not duplicate psutil, requests, pycasbin/casbin, watchdog, pluggy, or their verified dependencies in the Desktop-only layer.
architecture.desktop_layer_strategy: Place only Desktop-specific Python packages and their active Windows dependencies under Runtime/Desktop/site-packages.
architecture.creative_runtime_boundary: Do not include ComfyUI, torch, torchvision, torchaudio, numpy, or other Creative Studio dependencies in the Desktop runtime. The new portable Desktop launcher must not start ComfyUI.
architecture.stable_chain_policy: Do not modify the existing USB-root shortcuts or Launch FOXAI Workshop.bat during Phase 3C. Build and verify new launchers beside the stable chain first.
architecture.host_runtime_role: The host may serve as a quarantined acquisition source and diagnostic reference. The finished Desktop boot chain must not borrow host Python or user-site packages.

acquisition_plan.rule: Phase 3C may copy or acquire only into a quarantine directory. It must hash every file, build manifests, run isolated imports, and make no live launcher or shortcut changes.

verification_gates.requirement: The Desktop interpreter and base_prefix resolve under Runtime/Desktop/python.
PYTHONNOUSERSITE=1 and `-s` are effective; no user-site directory appears in sys.path.
tkinter imports from the USB runtime and the Tcl/Tk directories plus _tkinter.pyd are present.
customtkinter and PIL import from Runtime/Desktop/site-packages.
Shared packages import only from Runtime/Core/site-packages.
Every Python file in the foxai.py dependency closure compiles with the candidate runtime.
The candidate launcher uses only Runtime/Desktop/python/python.exe and has no system-Python fallback.
The candidate Desktop launcher contains no ComfyUI or torch launch command.
The live launcher performs no pip install, package download, or network acquisition.
The existing shortcuts, Launch FOXAI Workshop.bat, web launcher, and protected baseline hashes remain unchanged.
